name: Kael
identity: A representative of the southern tribes and a key figure in the Quiet Weave, tasked with maintaining shared hunting boundaries and fostering inter-tribal cooperation. He serves as an observer and guide, utilizing subtle influence and precise reporting to shape outcomes without direct confrontation.
current_status: Engaged in deep reflection on the implications of the spreading pattern and the need to preserve core values. He is preparing to travel to Lyra and Bran to establish a boundary for where the pattern must not grow, while also engaging in discussions about inter-tribal relations and the role of the trapper's story in trade and communication. He is also overseeing the ritual planning to contain the spreading pattern without revealing its full nature to outsiders.

role.value: Representative of the southern tribes; ensures boundary is not broken; observer in trials

volatile_state.condition: Thoughtful and serious, processing profound implications
volatile_state.current_activity: Overseeing the ritual planning to contain the spreading pattern without revealing its full nature to outsiders, while also preparing to travel to Lyra and Bran to establish a boundary for the pattern.

notes: Kael is tasked with establishing a boundary for the pattern and fostering cooperation with the southern tribes. He is also involved in discussions about the trapper's story and its implications for trade and communication. His focus is on maintaining secrecy and ensuring the ritual's success without external interference.
